'''âm-dh-z-zh''' ('''kamadhzezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:staine|staine]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-dh-z-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:staine|staine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-dh-z-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kamadhzezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimadhzezhoko|thimadhzezhoko]] || [[word:jimadhzezhoko|jimadhzezhoko]] || [[word:shimadhzezhoko|shimadhzezhoko]] || [[word:kimadhzezhoko|kimadhzezhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumadhzezhoko|thuthumadhzezhoko]] || [[word:jujumadhzezhoko|jujumadhzezhoko]] || [[word:shushumadhzezhoko|shushumadhzezhoko]] || [[word:kukumadhzezhoko|kukumadhzezhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomadhzezhoko|thomadhzezhoko]] || [[word:jomadhzezhoko|jomadhzezhoko]] || [[word:shomadhzezhoko|shomadhzezhoko]] || [[word:komadhzezhoko|komadhzezhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠmadhzezhoko|thĂŠmadhzezhoko]] || [[word:jĂŠmadhzezhoko|jĂŠmadhzezhoko]] || [[word:shĂŠmadhzezhoko|shĂŠmadhzezhoko]] || [[word:kĂŠmadhzezhoko|kĂŠmadhzezhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
